notes: The M-8x2 is a 1U rackmount power conditioner with 9 total NEMA 5-15R outlets (8 rear, 1 front) and a captive 6 ft cord (NEMA 5-15P). Rated 15A, 120VAC/60Hz. No signal ports. The power inlet is represented as nema-5-15 since the cord is captive — there is no IEC inlet. Type field set to 'Power conditioner' which maps to the 'Other' enum value as there is no exact match; category is 'power'.

ports.name: AC Outlets (Rear)
ports.note: 8 switched NEMA 5-15R outlets on rear panel; 3 spaced for wall-wart adapters

ports.name: AC Outlet (Front)
ports.note: 1 convenience NEMA 5-15R outlet on front panel

ports.name: AC In
ports.note: Captive 6 ft 14 AWG line cord with NEMA 5-15P plug; not a detachable IEC inlet
